extraction.one_line_summary: CHAVES Esteban won from breakaway on Etna after YATES Simon attacked favorites with 2km left, then gifted stage to teammate
tactical_patterns: YATES Simon attacked at 2km when DENNIS Rohan cracked, capitalizing on Sky domestique failure to control steep gradient
Mitchelton-Scott placed CHAVES Esteban in early break while YATES protected GC, enabling stage gift without losing bonus seconds
PINOT Thibaut sprinted for remaining time bonuses after 1-2, revealing bonus seconds matter more than positioning on summit finishes
TEN DAM Laurens crashed mid-climb removing DUMOULIN Tom's key climbing support before decisive phase, exposing shallow Sky mountain roster

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked decisively with 2km remaining and looked comfortable controlling favorites group throughout Etna ascent
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: strong enough in breakaway to drop Colombians like NIV Guy on steepest Etna gradients before stage gift
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: negative: cracked when pace lifted with 2-3km left, unable to sustain threshold on extended steep gradient
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: looked uncomfortable throughout climb but stayed with favorites group, suggests bluffing weakness or genuinely struggling
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: sprinted aggressively for bonus seconds after climb showing both recovery capacity and tactical awareness of GC margins
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: lost key lieutenant TEN DAM Laurens to crash mid-climb, revealing team depth vulnerability on high mountains
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: neutral: animated in breakaway but couldn't sustain effort on steepest section, health issues post-stage win affecting form
